hero_subtitle: SFTY connects wallet risk signals, transaction monitoring and sanctions data into one operational layer that streamlines review, case management and audit-ready evidence for VASPs.

problem_title: Blockchain analytics remain disconnected from workflows
problem_description: Compliance teams must monitor wallet and transaction risks across isolated provider dashboards, which slows alert triage and weakens risk context. This fragmentation creates gaps between blockchain analytics outputs and structured case management, complicating audit readiness and regulatory review preparation.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates blockchain analytics outputs, wallet risk signals, transaction data and provider results into one structured workflow, enabling compliance teams to triage alerts with full context and maintain audit-ready case evidence.
workflow_title: Wallet risk moves into case review
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk signals, routes alerts into structured cases, supports manual reviews and records decisions with evidence for ongoing compliance control.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond isolated dashboards. Structured risk workflows
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects blockchain analytics outputs into unified workflows, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence to help compliance teams manage on-chain risk efficiently.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing blockchain analytics with provider consolidation, audit-ready evidence and secure deployment to strengthen transaction monitoring and due diligence workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support blockchain analytics for compliance teams
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how transaction risk links to wallet monitoring cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence preserves blockchain analytics outputs
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY manages provider orchestration for KYT data
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects wallet risk, transaction monitoring, and blockchain analytics into a connected compliance workflow for teams managing digital asset risks and regulatory obligations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle KYT alerts and cases?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates KYT alerts from multiple providers, routes them through defined review workflows, creates linked cases, logs decisions, and preserves evidence in one operational system.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records decision logs, case histories, and supporting evidence with audit-grade metadata to support review readiness and regulatory inspection requirements.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY works above existing KYT providers by connecting their outputs into centralized workflows without requiring replacement or duplication of provider systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY complements current compliance providers by turning their outputs into structured workflows, cases and reports without replacing the underlying tools.
final_title: Connect blockchain analytics into structured compliance cases
final_description: Review how SFTY brings KYT, wallet risk, transaction monitoring and sanctions data into connected case workflows for VASP teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
